subtitle: Set goals and reclaim your hours

views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main dashboard showing today's progress ring against daily goal, time remaining, category breakdown donut, and streak badge. Quick-add FAB for logging a session.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick session logging with duration stepper (0.25h increments), category picker with icons, intentionality selector, device picker, and optional app name/note.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Date-grouped session history with daily totals, color-coded category tags, and filter by category/device/intentionality. Each day shows total vs goal with over/under indicator.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Weekly bar chart of daily totals with goal line overlay, category pie chart, intentional vs mindless ratio trend, weekday vs weekend comparison, device distribution, and AI-style insights.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTotalHours
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of all session durations logged today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of daily goal consumed (todayTotalHours / dailyGoal), clamped 0-1 for ring, can exceed 1.0 for over-goal display

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayRemainingHours
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Hours remaining before hitting daily goal (max 0). Negative means over-goal.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days where total screen time stayed at or below the daily goal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All-time longest streak of days at or below daily goal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverageHours
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily screen time over the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrendPercentage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change of this week's average vs previous week's average. Negative = improvement (less screen time).

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total hours per category for selected period, sorted descending for pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyTotalsChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily total hours for last 14 days for bar chart, with goal line reference

viewModelComputedProperties.name: intentionalityRatio
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of total time classified as intentional vs habitual+mindless for current week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topCategory
viewModelComputedProperties.description: The category with the most hours this week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topCategoryHours
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Hours spent in the top category this week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weekdayAverage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily hours on weekdays (Mon-Fri) over last 4 weeks

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weekendAverage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily hours on weekends (Sat-Sun) over last 4 weeks

viewModelComputedProperties.name: deviceBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total hours per device type for selected period

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalAdherenceRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of days in the last 30 days where screen time was at or below goal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: mindlessHoursThisWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total hours of mindless scrolling this week, highlighted as recoverable time

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Generated insight strings like 'Social media is 42% of your screen time — up 15% from last week' or 'You saved 2.3 hours this week vs your monthly average'

dailyGoal.description: User-configurable daily screen time limit in hours. Progress ring fills as usage approaches goal; turns red when exceeded. Ring color: green (<60%), yellow (60-90%), red (>90%).

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts toward the streak if total logged screen time is at or below the daily goal AND at least one session was logged (no free passes for untracked days). Streak resets on days that exceed the goal.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Primary trend: rolling 7-day average compared to previous 7-day period, shown as percentage change (negative = improvement). Secondary: 30-day moving average for long-term trajectory. Weekend vs weekday split to identify pattern differences. Category-level trends to spot rising time sinks.
insights: Goal adherence rate with encouragement (e.g., 'You hit your goal 5 of 7 days this week — strong discipline!')
Top time-consuming category alert with week-over-week change
Mindless scrolling hours quantified as 'recoverable time' (e.g., '3.5 hours of mindless scrolling this week — that's a whole movie')
Weekend vs weekday pattern detection (e.g., 'Weekends average 2.1 hours more than weekdays')
Device pattern insights (e.g., 'Phone accounts for 78% of your screen time')
Time-of-day pattern if entries cluster (e.g., most sessions logged in evening)
Monthly progress summary comparing current month average to previous month
